title: Solar Finance
description: $0 upfront green loans from accredited Australian lenders.

hero.title: Solar Finance
hero.lede: $0 upfront green loans from accredited Australian lenders.

prose: Spread the cost of your solar system with finance designed for renewable energy. STC rebates are still applied upfront, reducing the amount you finance.

Example (indicative)

ItemAmount (AUD)
6.6 kW system (before STCs)$9,500
STC rebate−$2,680
Amount financed$6,820
Fortnightly repayment (5 yr, 6.9% p.a.)~$89
Subject to lender approval. Comparison rate 6.9% p.a. based on $30,000 loan over 5 years. Fees and charges apply.
Apply with your quote
